Dh. inclinations are towards Government
service. Then comes Venus in the
fourth house from Jupiter and this'
indicates that the native's profession will be related to finance. The Sun is
behind Venus the. planet of happiness. Mars is in conjunction with Ketu
having no planet in the preceding or succeeding houses.

IMPORTANT CHARTS 165
Mars in his transit meets Saturn first of all. There b also Jupiter
indicating meditation and devotion for Brahmans. Further on is Mercury the
enemy. Still further on is the beautiful maiden Venus. Then finally he meets
the worst enemy Rahu. All these indicate that the native's family life will be
shattered. There will be no peace of mind for him. Venus is posited in the
house adjacent to that occupied by Rahu. This indicates that his wife will be
obstinate and cunning. The native will wed two women. The first marriage
